entitySuffixRule: Must contain the words "limited liability company" or the abbreviations "L.L.C.," "LLC," "L.C.," or "LC" (§ 1-502). A benefit LLC adds the word "Benefit."
distinguishabilityNote: Must be distinguishable, as required by § 1-503, on the records of the State Department of Assessments and Taxation from the names of other domestic and foreign entities and from reserved or registered names on the Department's records. A name that is not distinguishable may be used with the consent of the other holder.
nameReservationCostBasis: The SDAT fee to reserve a name is $25.
notes: Maryland is not a Secretary of State state: LLCs are formed, named, and searched at the State Department of Assessments and Taxation (SDAT). The LLC name section (§ 4A-208) points to the general naming rules in Title 1, Subtitle 5, so the designator (§ 1-502) and the distinguishability test on SDAT records (§ 1-503) are the same for every Maryland entity. A reservation lasts only 30 days, one of the shortest holds in the country. Maryland LLCs file an annual report carrying a flat $300 fee (the state's business personal-property return), due April 15.
